posts.text: For centuries society women in America and Europe gave the tiara market its sparkle, as they had to wear them to balls and other lavish events. posts.text:
BREAKING: SpaceX is proposing to spend $55 billion to begin construction of Terafab, Elon Musk's new semiconductor production facility in Texas.

The estimated total capital investment could rise to $119 billion if additional phases of the project are completed.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: As predicted… better algos will change the game… change the compute needs and collapse chip prices.   Not sure if this is the one. But I’m pretty sure it’s coming.
